titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bishar Ibn Yasar

text: و ما كان فيه عن بشّار بن يسار فقد رويته عن الحسين بن أحمد بن إدريس،- رضي اللّه عنه- عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي الصهبان، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن بشّار بن يسار.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Bishar ibn Yasar, I have narrated it from Al-Husayn ibn Ahmad ibn Idris - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Ṣuhban, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Bishar ibn Yasar.
